title: /mini:import-gsd slash command
goal: Add a /mini:import-gsd slash command following the mini pattern (no nested Claude, no interactive hang). Refactor 'mini import-gsd' to expose two non-interactive forms: '--prompt' prints the GSD extraction prompt to stdout (no Claude, no project required), and '--apply' reads the structured response from stdin, parses it preserving phase statuses, and saves the project + phases ('--force' overwrites an existing project, preserving its model config). The slash command body checks for .planning/, confirms overwrite when a project exists, runs 'mini import-gsd --prompt', has the in-session Claude read .planning/ and produce the contract, then pipes it into 'mini import-gsd --apply'. The bare 'mini import-gsd' terminal flow keeps working (now sharing the parse/save logic). Add import-gsd to COMMAND_DEFS (18 commands), update the slash-command-count test (17->18), README, and add unit tests for applyImport.

steps.title: Extract shared save + add applyImport
steps.detail: In import-gsd.ts factor the project.md/state build + save into a shared helper; add applyImport(text, {cwd, force}) that checks for an existing project (errors without --force, preserves its models), parses the response (preserving statuses) and saves. The bare importGsd() reuses the shared save.

steps.title: Wire CLI --prompt / --apply / --force
steps.detail: In cli.ts the import-gsd command gains --prompt (print buildImportGsdPrompt() to stdout, no project needed), --apply (read stdin and call applyImport) and --force; bare 'mini import-gsd' keeps the interactive flow.

steps.title: Add the /mini:import-gsd slash command
steps.detail: Add import-gsd to COMMAND_DEFS with a body that checks .planning/, confirms overwrite if a project exists, runs 'mini import-gsd --prompt', reads .planning/ in-session, and pipes the contract into 'mini import-gsd --apply' (+ --force). Update the slash-command-count test 17->18.

steps.title: README + applyImport tests
steps.detail: Note /mini:import-gsd in README; add unit tests for applyImport (parses + saves with statuses, refuses an existing project without --force, preserves models, rejects an unreadable response).
